dependency_input_projections.ExplicitWitnessParameterAdmitted: always project formal_parameter_surface/identity/trait as the callee WitnessParameter; for forwarded_parameter only, separately project evidence_binding_surface/identity/declared_trait as the caller WitnessParameter; both parameter projections set evidence_origin=parameter_declaration, witness_use_context=explicit_parameter_declaration, escapes=false, ownership=borrowed
dependency_input_projections.ConformanceEvidenceOriginAdmitted: branch on evidence_origin: forwarded_parameter requires the admitted matching caller binding; coherent_conformance requires the exact using conformance(Type conforms Trait) surface and one visible coherent candidate without creating a binding
dependency_input_projections.WitnessCoherent: retain witness_id, implementation_id, resolved_evidence_trait, and every product_evidence coherence field; propagate its ordered primary diagnostic unchanged
